description_long: This is a large, cylindrical wooden barrel with a dark, weathered finish and prominent horizontal wood grain. The barrel is reinforced at both ends with thick, black metal bands, each studded with large rivets for added durability. The wood staves are tightly fitted, and the surface shows natural knots and texture, suggesting it is made from solid planks. A simple, vertical metal latch or strap is visible on one side, possibly for securing a lid or for decorative purposes. The ends of the barrel are flat and also reinforced with metal, giving it a robust, industrial appearance. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban environments for storage, waste collection, or decorative purposes.
description: A large, dark wooden barrel with black metal bands and a weathered, textured surface. It features prominent rivets and a simple metal latch on one side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the curved wooden surface with a vertical metal latch and two black metal bands with rivets.
description_view_1: The side view displays the flat, circular end of the barrel, fully framed by a black metal band with visible rivets.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the continuous wooden planks and the second set of black metal bands, with no latch visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing the flat end and metal banding, but without any latch or additional features.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops at both ends
